name: opend6-space
description: This is a system intended for playing OpenD6 Space on Foundry VTT. It uses the rules from the OpenD6 Project SRD found at http://opend6project.org. Content comes from the OpenD6 Space System, of which a PDF rulebook can be found at https://ogc.rpglibrary.org/index.php?title=OpenD6. The ruleset has been released under the terms of the OGL v1.0a.
